caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on political developments in Bihar. The screen displays two men in white attire, one walking and the other standing with hands clasped, set against a backdrop featuring a map of Bihar with lightning bolts, symbolizing a significant event or challenge. The text on the screen highlights a "direct hit" by Tejashwi on Nitish Kumar, suggesting a political confrontation. The lower third of the screen mentions that the Prime Minister has assured the fulfillment of the aspirations of the people of Bihar. The visuals and text indicate a discussion on governance challenges and political dynamics within the state, with key figures like Nitish Kumar and Tejashwi being central to the narrative. The time displayed is 10:04 PM, indicating this segment was broadcast during a late-night news program.
